institution.name: Central Christian College of the Bible

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Central Christian College of the Bible fell 79% between 2021 and 2024 (48.5% → 10.3%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Central Christian College of the Bible fell 49% between 2021 and 2024 (42.9% → 21.9%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Central Christian College of the Bible rose 32% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.2k → $12.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Central Christian College of the Bible rose 25% between 2006 and 2009 ($8.2k → $10.3k).
